creator: eric@krausser-edv.de
text:
I sometimes close my VirtualBox accidentally by pressing Alt-F4 (instead of the window in the guest OS). I even missed the cross upper right one day (to close a window in the guest) and hit the cross from VirtualBox window.

It will save someones hard work if an (optional) dialog would ask if the user really wants to exit VirtualBox. 

see http://www.virtualbox.org/ticket/6077
